title: Pacaltsdorp United down Mossel Bay to retain T20 title
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Pacaltsdorp United retained the Six Gun Grill SWD T20 knock-out title this past Sunday, after a comprehensive nine-wicket victory against Mossel Bay.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Pacaltsdorp United retained the Six Gun Grill SWD T20 knock-out title this past Sunday, after a comprehensive nine-wicket victory against Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The challengers, Mossel Bay, who were put in to bat, had a good start but could not capitalise on it and were restricted to 109/9 after 20 overs, thanks to tight bowling from Grant Simpson (2/23), Anoxolo Kitshini (2/18) and Liyabona Malife (2/21).","html":"The challengers, Mossel Bay, who were put in to bat, had a good start but could not capitalise on it and were restricted to 109/9 after 20 overs, thanks to tight bowling from Grant Simpson (2/23), Anoxolo Kitshini (2/18) and Liyabona Malife (2/21)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp easily chased down the target, responding with 112/9 after only 9.5 overs for an easy victory. Askin Louw (36* from 26 balls; 5x4) and George van Heerden (51* from 17 balls) were destructive with the bat. They received good support from Bradley Carolus (23).","html":"Pacaltsdorp easily chased down the target, responding with 112/9 after only 9.5 overs for an easy victory. Askin Louw (36* from 26 balls; 5x4) and George van Heerden (51* from 17 balls) were destructive with the bat. They received good support from Bradley Carolus (23)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Semi-finals","html":"Semi-finals"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay, a promotion league club, caused another upset when they became the first promotion league team to advance to the final after a thrilling six-wicket victory over Plett Pioneers.","html":"Mossel Bay, a promotion league club, caused another upset when they became the first promotion league team to advance to the final after a thrilling six-wicket victory over Plett Pioneers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pioneers batted first, posting a competitive 144/6 after 20 overs with Dandrick Moodien (39) the top scorer. Kevin de Kock (3/34) and Zayed Jacobs (2/10) were the pick of the bowlers for Mossel Bay. Thanks to a brilliant run chase by Jacobs (67), Tony Ferreira (23) and Kevin de Kock (19), Mossel Bay surpassed the target with 148/4, with an over to spare.","html":"Pioneers batted first, posting a competitive 144/6 after 20 overs with Dandrick Moodien (39) the top scorer. Kevin de Kock (3/34) and Zayed Jacobs (2/10) were the pick of the bowlers for Mossel Bay. Thanks to a brilliant run chase by Jacobs (67), Tony Ferreira (23) and Kevin de Kock (19), Mossel Bay surpassed the target with 148/4, with an over to spare."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the other semi-final, Pacaltsdorp United recorded an easy eight-wicket victory against Knysna Cavaliers. Batting first, Cavaliers was restricted to a modest 89 all out. For Pacaltsdorp, Warren Bell excelled with figures of 5/22 in four overs.","html":"In the other semi-final, Pacaltsdorp United recorded an easy eight-wicket victory against Knysna Cavaliers. Batting first, Cavaliers was restricted to a modest 89 all out. For Pacaltsdorp, Warren Bell excelled with figures of 5/22 in four overs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United cruised to an easy eight-wicket victory thanks to contributions from Askin Louw (55* from 36 balls; 4x6, 6x4) and Warren Bell (22* from 25 balls; 1x6, 2x4).","html":"Pacaltsdorp United cruised to an easy eight-wicket victory thanks to contributions from Askin Louw (55* from 36 balls; 4x6, 6x4) and Warren Bell (22* from 25 balls; 1x6, 2x4)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Summarised scorecards for semi-finals and finals","html":"Summarised scorecards for semi-finals and finals"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Semi-finals","html":"Semi-finals"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United beat Knysna Cavaliers by 8 wickets","html":"Pacaltsdorp United beat Knysna Cavaliers by 8 wickets"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers 89 all out – 18 overs (Francois Bonthuys 19, Warren Bell 5/22)","html":"Knysna Cavaliers 89 all out – 18 overs (Francois Bonthuys 19, Warren Bell 5/22)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United 90/2 – 13.1 overs (Askin Louw 55*, Warren Bell 22*)","html":"Pacaltsdorp United 90/2 – 13.1 overs (Askin Louw 55*, Warren Bell 22*)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay beat Plett Pioneers by 6 wickets","html":"Mossel Bay beat Plett Pioneers by 6 wickets"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plett Pioneers 144/6 – 20 overs (Dandrick Moodien 39, Garth Bock 24, Kyle Jacobs 24, Zayed Jacobs 2/10, Kevin de Kock 3/34)","html":"Plett Pioneers 144/6 – 20 overs (Dandrick Moodien 39, Garth Bock 24, Kyle Jacobs 24, Zayed Jacobs 2/10, Kevin de Kock 3/34)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay 148/4 – 19 overs (Zayed Jacobs 67, Tony Ferreira 23, Kyle Jacobs 2/12)","html":"Mossel Bay 148/4 – 19 overs (Zayed Jacobs 67, Tony Ferreira 23, Kyle Jacobs 2/12)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Final","html":"Final"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United beat Mossel Bay by 9 wickets","html":"Pacaltsdorp United beat Mossel Bay by 9 wickets"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay 109/9 - 20 overs (Hanlo Nel 21, Tyron John 20, Grant Simpson 2/23, Anoxolo Kitshini 2/18, Liyabona Malife 2/21)","html":"Mossel Bay 109/9 - 20 overs (Hanlo Nel 21, Tyron John 20, Grant Simpson 2/23, Anoxolo Kitshini 2/18, Liyabona Malife 2/21)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United 112/9 - 9.5 overs (Askin Louw 36*, Bradley Carolus 23, George van Heerden 51*)","html":"Pacaltsdorp United 112/9 - 9.5 overs (Askin Louw 36*, Bradley Carolus 23, George van Heerden 51*)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
